justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preferences and subsequent adjustments.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the initial request was unavailable and then found an earlier slot on the user's preferred day.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and responded to the user's requests without unnecessary turns or redundant queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear options and successfully booking the desired appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search when the initial request was unavailable, leading to a successful booking.
